hypothesis: Paired single-component replay recovers known injected harness faults and selects more valid repairs than passive trace diagnosis at the same deterministic evaluation budget.

controls.description: Repeat the unchanged faulted harness and require exact outcome identity.
Edit unused metadata and require zero accepted causal credit.
Use six passive no-op replays plus one trace-selected repair at the same seven-evaluation budget.

gates.criterion: Each clean reference passes, each single-fault manifest fails, and no-op replay is exact.
Paired interventions recover the responsible component on all six harness surfaces with zero placebo credit.
Counterfactual repair success exceeds trace-diagnosis repair success at seven evaluations per case.
